plugins.name: codelore
plugins.description: Project docs as an auto-loaded context layer for AI sessions. Four skills: write, bulk-migrate, route into context, and critically review.

plugins.name: qa-vault-skills
plugins.description: Eight skills that make an AI agent a QA practitioner for the QA Vault platform: author, maintain, search, and organize manual UI test scenarios, and turn them into automated Playwright e2e tests — generate, heal, run, and report, closed-loop through the QA Vault MCP.
